Shining is the way by which a [[Thing beyond itself]] shines to you or makes itself apparent to you (phanes from phenomenology) from the [[void]]. 

It is the opposite of [[retreating]] in which something moves past the [[horizon]] in the other way into the [[void]] and leaves your experience.<ref>[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 47 47:00</ref>

== References ==
[[Category:Phenomenology]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
